title: Bass and Treble Amplifier Controls
description: Interactive simulation of classic amplifier frequency response with adjustable bass and treble controls.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Signal Processing
Audio
Equalization
Frequency Response
learningObjectives: Understand the key concepts of bass and treble amplifier controls
Explore bass and treble amplifier controls through interactive visualization
Apply knowledge of bass and treble amplifier controls to solve problems
Experiment with parameters to observe their effects on bass and treble amplifier controls
